## Parent

#7

## What to build

Restrict Workshop and Session creation to the Owner. Move or duplicate the create-workshop flow into Owner admin. When creating Sessions, Owner assigns a Teacher per Session from approved Teachers (including Owner). Remove Teacher access to workshop creation routes.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Only Owner can create and edit Workshops and Sessions
- [ ] Owner admin UI creates a Workshop with multiple Sessions and Teacher assignment per Session
- [ ] Teachers no longer see or reach "new workshop" creation
- [ ] Created Workshops appear on the public catalog immediately
- [ ] Owner can edit existing Workshops and reassign Session Teachers

## Blocked by

#2
